## What I'm trying to do

What are you building with `iac-tfm`?

## What I tried

What did you try? What step in `GETTING_STARTED.md` are you on?

## What I expected

What did you expect to happen?

## What happened

What actually happened? (error message, screenshot)

## Template version

- iac-tfm version: (git commit SHA or tag)
- Terraform version: `terraform version`
- AWS region:
- Did you run `scripts/init-from-template.sh`? Y/N

This is not a bug report — for bugs, use the bug template.
